# CRM Schema Reference

Generated `2026-04-25 09:36 UTC` from schema `public`. Regenerate with:

```bash
uv run python tools/generate_erd.py
```

The Mermaid block below renders directly in GitHub. To export to PNG/SVG,
install [`@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli`](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid-cli)
and run `mmdc -i docs/erd.md -o docs/erd.svg`.

```mermaid
erDiagram
    USERS ||--o{ ACCOUNTS : "owner_id"

    USERS ||--o{ ACTIVITIES : "owner_id"

    CONTACTS |o--o{ CAMPAIGN_MEMBERS : "contact_id"
    LEADS |o--o{ CAMPAIGN_MEMBERS : "lead_id"
    ACCOUNTS ||--o{ CASES : "account_id"
    CONTACTS |o--o{ CASES : "contact_id"
    ACCOUNTS ||--o{ CONTACTS : "account_id"
    CAMPAIGNS |o--o{ LEADS : "campaign_id"
    ACCOUNTS |o--o{ LEADS : "converted_account_id"
    OPPORTUNITIES |o--o{ LEADS : "converted_opportunity_id"
    ACCOUNTS ||--o{ OPPORTUNITIES : "account_id"
    CAMPAIGNS |o--o{ OPPORTUNITIES : "campaign_id"
    USERS ||--o{ OPPORTUNITIES : "owner_id"

    PRODUCTS ||--o{ OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ITEMS : "product_id"
    PRICEBOOKS ||--o{ PRICEBOOK_ENTRIES : "pricebook_id"
    PRODUCTS ||--o{ PRICEBOOK_ENTRIES : "product_id"
    USERS |o--o{ USERS : "manager_id"

    ACCOUNTS {
        bigint id PK
        text name
        text industry
        int employees
        numeric annual_revenue
        text country
        bigint owner_id FK
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    ACTIVITIES {
        bigint id PK
        text subject
        text type
        text related_to_type
        bigint account_id FK
        bigint opportunity_id FK
        bigint lead_id FK
        bigint owner_id FK
        date due_date
        timestamptz completed_at
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    CAMPAIGN_MEMBERS {
        bigint id PK
        bigint campaign_id FK
        bigint lead_id FK
        bigint contact_id FK
        text status
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    CAMPAIGNS {
        bigint id PK
        text name
        text type
        text status
        date start_date
        date end_date
        numeric budget
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    CASES {
        bigint id PK
        bigint account_id FK
        bigint contact_id FK
        text subject
        text status
        text priority
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    CONTACTS {
        bigint id PK
        bigint account_id FK
        text first_name
        text last_name
        text email
        text title
        text phone
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    LEADS {
        bigint id PK
        text company
        text first_name
        text last_name
        text email
        text source
        text status
        timestamptz converted_at
        bigint converted_account_id FK
        bigint converted_opportunity_id FK
        bigint campaign_id FK
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    OPPORTUNITIES {
        bigint id PK
        bigint account_id FK
        text name
        text stage
        numeric amount
        numeric probability
        date close_date
        bigint owner_id FK
        bigint campaign_id FK
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ITEMS {
        bigint id PK
        bigint opportunity_id FK
        bigint product_id FK
        int quantity
        numeric unit_price
        numeric discount
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    PRICEBOOK_ENTRIES {
        bigint id PK
        bigint pricebook_id FK
        bigint product_id FK
        numeric unit_price
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    PRICEBOOKS {
        bigint id PK
        text name
        text currency
        bool active
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    PRODUCTS {
        bigint id PK
        text name
        text category
        text family
        numeric list_price
        bool active
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
    USERS {
        bigint id PK
        text name
        text email
        text role
        text region
        text team
        bigint manager_id FK
        timestamptz created_at
        timestamptz updated_at
    }
```

Reading the diagram: `||` means *exactly one*, `|o` means *zero or one*
(the FK column is nullable), `o{` means *zero or many*. The labels on each
edge are the FK column on the child table.

## Views (3)

- `account_all_activities`
- `lead_activities`
- `opportunity_activities`

These views wrap the polymorphic `activities` table; prefer them over
filtering on `related_to_type` directly. See the README's "Convenience
views" section.
